sentences.target: Yo tengo un don para cantar.

translations.es: Yo tengo un don para cantar.
translations.en: I have a gift for singing.
translations.de: Ich habe ein Talent zum Singen.
translations.it: Ho un talento per il canto.
translations.ru: У меня есть дар к пению.
translations.pt: Eu tenho um dom para cantar.
translations.vi: Tôi có năng khiếu ca hát.
translations.nl: Ik heb een talent voor zingen.
translations.uk: У мене є хист до співу.
translations.hi: मेरे पास गाने की प्रतिभा है।
translations.nb: Jeg har et talent for å synge.
translations.sv: Jag har en talang för att sjunga.
translations.da: Jeg har et talent for at synge.

tokens.explanation: First-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, first-person singular present indicative of tener.
Indefinite article modifying the noun that follows.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the verb and core noun in the phrase.
Preposition introducing an infinitival purpose complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of para.

sentences.target: Mi hermana tiene un don para pintar.
sentences.reading: /mi eɾˈmana ˈtjene un don paɾa pinˈtaɾ/

translations.es: Mi hermana tiene un don para pintar.
translations.ipa: /mi eɾˈmana ˈtjene un don paɾa pinˈtaɾ/
translations.en: My sister has a gift for painting.
translations.fr: Ma sœur a un don pour peindre.
translations.de: Meine Schwester hat ein Talent zum Malen.
translations.it: Mia sorella ha un talento per dipingere.
translations.ko: 내 여동생은 그림 그리는 재능이 있다.
translations.ru: У моей сестры есть дар к живописи.
translations.pt: Minha irmã tem um dom para pintar.
translations.tr: Kız kardeşimin resim yapma yeteneği var.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi có năng khiếu vẽ tranh.
translations.nl: Mijn zus heeft een talent voor schilderen.
translations.uk: Моя сестра має хист до малювання.
translations.hu: A húgomnak tehetsége van a festéshez.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन में चित्रकारी की प्रतिभा है।
translations.pl: Moja siostra ma dar do malowania.
translations.el: Η αδερφή μου έχει χάρισμα στη ζωγραφική.
translations.nb: Søsteren min har et talent for å male.
translations.id: Saudara perempuan saya punya bakat untuk melukis.
translations.sv: Min syster har en talang för att måla.
translations.ro: Sora mea are un talent pentru pictură.
translations.cs: Moje sestra má talent na malování.
translations.da: Min søster har et talent for at male.
translations.ja: 私の妹には絵を描く才能がある。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, third-person singular present indicative of tener.
Indefinite article modifying the noun that follows.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the verb and core noun in the phrase.
Preposition introducing an infinitival purpose complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of para.

sentences.target: Él muestra su don al bailar.

translations.es: Él muestra su don al bailar.
translations.en: He shows his talent by dancing.
translations.fr: Il montre son talent en dansant.
translations.de: Er zeigt sein Talent beim Tanzen.
translations.ko: 그는 춤으로 자신의 재능을 보여 준다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他通过跳舞展示自己的天赋。
translations.yue: 佢透過跳舞展示自己嘅天份。
translations.pt: Ele mostra seu dom ao dançar.
translations.he: הוא מראה את הכישרון שלו בריקוד.
translations.vi: Anh ấy thể hiện tài năng của mình bằng cách nhảy.
translations.nl: Hij laat zijn talent zien door te dansen.
translations.hi: वह नाचकर अपनी प्रतिभा दिखाता है।
translations.nb: Han viser talentet sitt ved å danse.
translations.sv: Han visar sin talang genom att dansa.
translations.da: Han viser sit talent ved at danse.
translations.ja: 彼は踊って才能を見せている。

tokens.explanation: Third-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, third-person singular present indicative of mostrar.
Possessive determiner modifying the noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the verb.
Contraction of a + el, introducing an infinitival clause.
Infinitive verb functioning within the prepositional phrase headed by al.

sentences.target: Todos notan el don de Ana.

translations.es: Todos notan el don de Ana.
translations.fr: Tout le monde remarque le talent d’Ana.
translations.it: Tutti notano il talento di Ana.
translations.zh-Hans: 大家都注意到安娜的天赋。
translations.pt: כולם notam o dom de Ana.
translations.vi: Mọi người đều nhận ra tài năng của Ana.
translations.hi: सबको आना की प्रतिभा दिखती है।
translations.el: Όλοι προσέχουν το ταλέντο της Άνα.
translations.nb: Alle legger merke til Anas talent.
translations.sv: Alla lägger märke till Anas talang.
translations.ja: みんながアナの才能に気づく。
